parameters.query: SELECT id, status, company_data, contacts, tech_stack, enrichment_steps FROM enrichment_jobs WHERE idempotency_key = '{{ $json.idempotency_key }}' AND status = 'completed' LIMIT 1

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $json.id, status: 'completed', cached: true, company_data: $json.company_data, contacts: $json.contacts, tech_stack: $json.tech_stack, enrichment_steps: $json.enrichment_steps }) }}

parameters.query: =INSERT INTO enrichment_jobs (input_domain, idempotency_key, status) VALUES ('{{ $('Validate & Check Idempotency').first().json.domain }}', '{{ $('Validate & Check Idempotency').first().json.idempotency_key }}', 'enriching') ON CONFLICT (idempotency_key) DO UPDATE SET status = 'enriching', updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 500, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B data enrichment API. Given a company domain, return structured JSON about the company.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'Enrich this company domain: ' + $('Validate & Check Idempotency').first().json.domain + '. Return JSON with: name, description, industry, employee_count_range, headquarters, founded_year, website. Only return valid JSON, no markdown.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 500, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B tech stack analysis API.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'What technologies does the company at ' + $('Validate & Check Idempotency').first().json.domain + ' likely use? Return JSON with: cms, analytics, email_platform, crm, marketing_automation, hosting, frontend_framework, other_tools. Only valid JSON.' }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'llama-3.3-70b-versatile', temperature: 0.2, max_tokens: 500, messages: [{ role: 'system', content: 'You are a B2B contact research API.' }, { role: 'user', content: 'For the company at ' + $('Validate & Check Idempotency').first().json.domain + ', generate 3 likely decision-maker contacts for B2B sales. Return JSON array with: name, title, department, seniority, likely_email_pattern. Only valid JSON.' }] }) }}

parameters.query: UPDATE enrichment_jobs SET status = '{{ $json.status }}', company_data = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.company_data) }}'::jsonb, contacts = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.contacts) }}'::jsonb, tech_stack = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.tech_stack) }}'::jsonb, enrichment_steps = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.enrichment_steps) }}'::jsonb, error_log = '{{ JSON.stringify($json.error_log) }}'::jsonb, updated_at = NOW(), completed_at = CASE WHEN '{{ $json.status }}' IN ('completed','failed') THEN NOW() ELSE NULL END WHERE id = {{ $json.job_id }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ job_id: $('Determine Status').first().json.job_id, status: $('Determine Status').first().json.status, domain: $('Determine Status').first().json.domain, company_data: $('Determine Status').first().json.company_data, tech_stack: $('Determine Status').first().json.tech_stack, contacts: $('Determine Status').first().json.contacts, enrichment_steps: $('Determine Status').first().json.enrichment_steps }) }}
